# Tailor Express

> Premium tailoring services across Kuwait with 9 branches, 24/7 availability at select locations, home service, drive-thru, and Tailor Cloud smart lockers.

## Background

Tailor Express is a Kuwait-based tailoring chain founded by Dr. Shaikha E Alduaij. Operating 9 branches across Kuwait (including 24/7 service at Hessa Al-Mubarak and Yarmouk), the brand offers comprehensive tailoring services with modern conveniences like home pickup, drive-thru drop-off, and 24/7 smart locker pickup.

## Services

- Clothing alterations and repairs
- Home tailoring service across Kuwait
- Drive-thru drop-off and pickup at select branches
- Tailor Cloud 24/7 smart locker pickup
- Uniform alterations for corporate, school, and organizations
- Wedding suit and gown alterations
- Event and brand activations

## Locations

9 branches across Kuwait:
- The Avenues (Al-Rai) — Flagship
- Hessa District (24/7)
- Promenade
- W-Mishrif
- Yarmouk (24/7)
- Qurtoba
- Zahra Complex
- Dasma
- Premium Tailor
